display_text: Phoenix Ash. Tier unknown / Event/Neutral item: Grants a single-use passive that prevents lethal damage, instead healing the wearer to 50% health and resetting non-ultimate ability cooldowns. Consumed on activation. Provides a second chance in critical moments. Stats: Heal: 50% of max health.
